title: clusia fructiangusta
intro: Clusia fructiangusta, also known as Clusia rosea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Clusia fructiangusta include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Clusia fructiangusta can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
